addon.name: Collection View Manager
addon.provider-name: Claude.ai with assistance from Michael Beck

extension.summary: Apply one view mode to every movie collection
extension.description: Capture your preferred view (e.g. InfoWall, Poster) from any single movie collection and apply it to every collection in your library at once, instead of setting it one by one. Works with any skin — it copies Kodi's own saved view state rather than assuming a particular skin's view IDs.
